The '''''Ocean''''' was a [[Destroyer/Legends|Destroyer]] employed by the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
The ''Ocean'' was a fleet [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] in charge of the [[blockade of Corellia]] by the Alliance's [[Third Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Third]] and [[Fifth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Fifth Fleets]].

Newly promoted [[Supreme Commander (Alliance)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] [[Cha Niathal]] was onboard the vessel during the onset of the blockade, as well as Third Fleet commanding officer [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Makin]]. [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] was assigned to the vessel.

As the war wore on, this vessel housed the highest percentage of Galactic Alliance personnel experiencing weapons malfunctions due to less than adequate supply. [[Biris J. Te Gaf]] was later assigned to this ship. It participated in the [[Second Battle of Fondor]] and the [[Second Battle of Roche]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]''
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]''
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Invincible]]''
